entity.label: Michri
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Prize of Jehovah, a Benjamite, the father of Uzzi (1 Chr. 9:8).

nodes.label: Michri
nodes.description: Prize of Jehovah, a Benjamite, the father of Uzzi (1 Chr. 9:8).

nodes.label: Uzzi
nodes.description: A Benjamite, a chief in the tribe (1 Chr. 9:8).

verses.text: And Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephathiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;
